channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Tuesday, May 12, 2026
item.description: Today's briefing has two dominant threads worth your strategic attention, Midya. The international student pipeline is under simultaneous pressure from multiple directions — visa uncertainty globally, a 20% US enrolment drop redirecting demand, and UK universities now facing inso...
